response.global_analysis: 1. Vocal Match: At the start of the video (00:00 - 00:02), the VTuber 'Aohashi Pame' utters a vocal expression of relief and gratitude. 2. Visual Text Subtitling: The rest of the video (00:02 - 00:59) contains no dialogue but displays a prominent, highly relevant letter on-screen written to her fans ('Naosu-gumi'). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to the vocalization first, and then the visual letter is cleanly segmented into readable blocks spanning the remainder of the video to ensure full accessibility.

subtitles.original: いつもぱめと楽しいを共有してくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for always sharing fun times with Pame!

subtitles.original: あなたが期待してくれるから もっとがんばりたい！もっと成長したいって思えるよ！
subtitles.english: Because you expect great things from me, it makes me want to work harder and grow even more!

subtitles.original: ぱめの歩みを支えてくれてありがとう♡
subtitles.english: Thank you for supporting Pame's journey ♡

subtitles.original: これからも一緒に、心地いい音を奏でていこうね！
subtitles.english: Let's keep creating pleasant sounds together in the future!
